arts.sum: The January transfer window offers Ruben Amorim his first opportunity to shape Manchester United into a team aligned with his vision. However, the significant changes are likely to come next summer, with reports suggesting Amorim has his eye on a key Paris Saint-Germain player. arts.ttl: Randal Kolo Muani Transfer to Juventus: Fabrizio Romano Updates on Unexpected Twist
arts.sum: Randal Kolo Muani’s loan move to Juventus has taken an unexpected turn. Everything seemed ready to go—medical checks completed, documents signed—but the official announcement is still pending. The issue? PSG has already reached FIFA’s limit of six players loaned abroad this season. arts.ttl: Arsenal Face Setback as Agent of €75M-Rated PSG Target Addresses Loan Rumors
arts.sum: RB Leipzig striker Benjamin Šeško was reportedly a target for Paris Saint-Germain during last year’s summer transfer window as the club searched for a reliable goal scorer after Kylian Mbappé’s departure. The Slovenian forward, under contract with Leipzig until 2029 and valued between €70 million to €75 million, made a strong impression during the 2023-24 […] The post Arsenal Face Setback as Agent of €75M-Rated PSG Target Addresses Loan Rumors appeared first on PSG Talk.

arts.ttl: Former Manchester United, PSG star Ander Herrera joins Boca Juniors
arts.sum: Former Manchester United and Paris Saint-Germain midfielder Ander Herrera has joined Argentinian giants Boca Juniors, the club announced on Friday. "My father worked here [in Argentina] for a long time, he told me a lot about Boca and I have maintained that passion since I was a child," Herrera said.

arts.ttl: European football: Kvaratskhelia seals PSG move, Frankfurt sink Dortmund
arts.sum: Winger completes ‘dream’ €70m move from Napoli Frankfurt 2-0 Dortmund, Montpellier 2-1 Monaco The Georgian winger Khvicha Kvaratskhelia has joined Paris Saint-Germain from Serie A side Napoli on a deal until 2029, the Ligue 1 club announced on Friday. “PSG are delighted to announce the signing of Khvicha Kvaratskhelia,” the club said in a statement. “The 23-year-old winger, who will wear the No 7 shirt, becomes the first Georgian player in the club’s history.” Continue reading...

arts.ttl: PSG sign Napoli forward Kvaratskhelia until 2029
arts.sum: Paris St-Germain sign Napoli and Georgia forward Khvicha Kvaratskhelia on a deal until June 2029.

arts.ttl: OFFICIAL: PSG complete Khvicha Kvaratskhelia transfer
arts.sum: Unbeknownst to the Serie A side at the time, Osimhen would not manage to secure the big-money move away that both he and the club anticipated, leaving Napoli in an awkward position financially and Kvaratskhelia frustrated. At the time, PSG were vying for the 23-year-old's signature and they even launched an incredible €200 million bid for Kvaratskhelia and teammate Victor Osimhen.

arts.ttl: Juventus rage at ‘amateurish’ PSG over Randal Kolo Muani loan blunder
